note: AUD5 fix for finding F-05 (docs/novakai/audit/04-findings.md). SCOPE: .mjs TOOLING, structure-only for the map (same boundary as aud5-f04) — real verification is node --test tools/novakai/roadmap.test.mjs (3 new tests failed pre-fix: evasive phrasings allowed, quoted mention denied, no tree scan) and npm run novakai:roadmap:audit on the live repo.

intent.problem: attack A6: the hand-written-status ban matched only two literal regexes in one file — a status table cell (| done ✅ |), a status sentence (Status — shipped) and inline HTML (state: built) all evaded it, while a doc QUOTING the pattern was falsely flagged, and CI scanned CLAUDE.md only.
intent.approach: roadmap.mjs: pattern set broadened to phrasing classes (state:/status-cell/status-sentence, emoji or word); fenced code blocks, inline code spans and blockquotes are exempt (quoted mention != status claim); new --audit-tree <dir> --allow <file> mode scans every .md under docs/ with an audited allowlist (docs/novakai/status-ban-allowlist.txt); novakai:roadmap:audit now runs CLAUDE.md + the docs tree.
intent.rationale: the ban is the enforcement of CLAUDE.md's one rule (intent, never status); a ban that two phrasings evade is a convention, not a gate. Tests first, per the work order.
